headline: Residence Acquires Influencer Agency  GateMaker
summary: GateMaker was founded in 2021 by Ashton Wall and Amelia Soohoo and has worked with brands such as Amika, Estee Lauder Companies, Glossier, LG, L'Occitane en Provence, Milk Makeup, NARS, NEST, Pacifica, Rag & Bone, Reebok, Starbucks, and more.

headline: Why Airbnb (ABNB) Stock Is Trading Up Today
summary: Shares of online accommodations platform Airbnb (NASDAQ:ABNB) jumped 4.9% in the morning session after the Trump administration announced a new peace deal that would lead to the reopening of the Strait of Hormuz.
